allergenMode.label: Allergen filter mode
allergenMode.strictDescription: Hide products that CONTAIN the selected allergens
allergenMode.very_strictDescription: Hide products that contain or may contain the selected allergens, including cross-reactions

allergens.title: Allergens to avoid
allergens.hint: Select the allergens you want to filter out

dietary.title: Dietary profile
dietary.hint: Only show products matching ALL selected profiles

cooking.title: Cooking method
cooking.hint: Show products using AT LEAST ONE selected method
